name: GGH Machilipatnam – Cook, Ward Boy and More – 12 Posts

basic_details.job_title: GGH Machilipatnam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 12 Cook, Ward Boy and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Government Teaching General Hospital Machilipatnam (GGH Machilipatnam) Recruitment 2026 for 12 posts of Cook, Ward Boy and More Posts. Candidates with 8th, MBBS, Any Graduate Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 12-05-2026, and closes on 22-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through GGH Machilipatnam official website krishna.ap.gov.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GGH Machilipatnam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
